name: Lineage, Inc.
description: Lineage, Inc. is the world's largest global temperature-controlled warehouse real estate investment trust (REIT). Headquartered in Novi, Michigan, the company operates a modern and strategically located network of over 500 facilities, totaling approximately 88 million square feet. Lineage focuses on transforming the food supply chain to eliminate waste and help feed the world by providing essential cold storage and logistics services. As a publicly traded company, it leverages its extensive infrastructure to support global food security and efficient distribution for a wide range of customers across the food and beverage industry.
